![Bibliography of vintage cocktail books image 1](https://cdn.diffords.com/contrib/encyclopedia/2024/01/65a8e066d2479.jpg)

# Bibliography of vintage cocktail books

**Since Richard Cook wrote the first known dedicated book in the English language recording drinks recipes in 1827 there has followed an awful lot of cocktail recipe books, many such titles having numerous editions. Navigating these tomes is essential to understanding the origin and development of the classic cocktails that appear on bar menus around the world to this day.**

Fortunately, mainly thanks to the [free digital library of the Exposition Universelle des Vins et Spiritueux (E.U.V.S.)](http://euvs-vintage-cocktail-books.cld.bz/), a [museum in Bendor Island](http://www.euvs.org/en/visit/about) in the south of France, many of these works are now free to read on-line.

You'll find a timeline bibliography of the most important vintage cocktail books on the following pages with links to read many of them online, and even download PDF copies for your reference via E.U.V.S., Archive.org, Cocktail Kingdom's library, Google Books and other resources. We have also included links to purchase reproductions.

[Books published 1800 to 1874](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1800-to-1874)

[Books published 1875 to 1889](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1875-to-1889)

[Books published 1890 to 1899](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1890-to-1899)

[Books published 1900 to 1904](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1900-to-1904)

[Books published 1905 to 1911](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1905-to-1911)

[Books published 1912 to 1919](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1912-to-1919)

[Books published 1920 to 1926](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1920-to-1926)

[Books published 1927 to 1929](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1927-to-1929)

[Books published 1930 to 1932](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1930-to-1932)

[Books published 1933](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1933)

[Books published 1934](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1934)

[Books published 1935 to 1937](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1935-to-1937)

[Books published 1938 to 1949](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1938-to-1949)

[Books published 1950 to 1999](/g/1239/vintage-cocktail-books/1950-to-1999)
